evidence: "This bio is well produced and a pleasure to watch."
"It was amazing being able to 'be there' and witness something special from such an amazing musical group."
"It's entertaining, fun to watch, has an awesome theme song that still rocks..."
"It feels transformative to be there vicariously."
"Jane's voice is so pleasant to listen to. She moves slowly and deliberately..."
"...the routines are a tougher workout than the description..."
"...it does not stand up to later concerts in the technological sense for cinematography."
"I buy all of Peggy's videos and liked this one a lot."
"This is a very good yoga DVD and it's not my first purchase of a Jane Adams video..."
"It feels transformative to be there vicariously."
"...conducts the class outside in a beautiful flower garden in the warm sunlight."
"...makes a boring task easy to do. I still laugh out loud to Lucy and always will."
"...I feel focused and restored when I am done."

summary: The user enjoys classic films, concerts, and light-hearted TV shows, often reflecting on nostalgia and emotional connections. They prefer simple narratives with a slower pace, valuing creators like Jane Adams and Peggy. Their reviews indicate a strong appreciation for sensory experiences that evoke positive feelings.
